steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0814.215057.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0814.215057 display name' acquirer using filter
Verify: a success message appears after deleting the acquirer
Verify: the deleted acquirer is no longer present in the table
